content_body: Great location, not far from Ingles Grocery Store (with Starbucks). The house is nearly as far back as you can go, but a peaceful setting. My husband liked the short, curvy drive to the unit. The unit was clean—no spiders (which I feared since it is fall). I used the oven to make pie and had no issues. We loved finding a place we could take our small dog. The towels, bedding, etc. were all comfortabe. It was nice that there was a washer and dryer, though we did not need it. We had an issue with no water the first night after running one bath, but the repairman came that night and was able to replace a clogged filter so then we were good to go again. I felt bad it was the eve of a holiday, but he was very kind, and we appreciated that we were taken care of promptly. We didn't get to use the hot tub and meant to...next time! We wish it had a one night less minimum stay; we had to leave a day earlier than our reservation ended. Things like paper towels, toilet paper, soap, etc. were all there, which was nice. It's probably not great for young children in that only the master bedroom is on the main floor. For couples and older kids it's great! Loved the air hockey table!
title: Very Tucked Away And Peaceful
